description: Create a complex GitHub Actions workflow named windows that runs on push to master and tags, pull requests, and workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: build and packaging. The build job uses a matrix strategy to run on windows-latest and ubuntu-latest for multiple architectures, checking out the code, setting up environment variables, restoring timestamps, handling build cache, downloading dependencies, installing MinGW, configuring and building the project, and uploading artifacts. The packaging job depends on the build job, runs on windows-latest, and generates a release with packaging name, downloads MinGW binaries and data, generates .pdb files, downloads stk-assets, moves folders, and starts packaging STK.
